value.stringValue: לבדיקת אחות טרום ניתוח – החלטה והמלצות

assignments.name: Assign_Appointment_Data_Nurse_Triage_Match
assignments.label: Assign Appointment Data- Nurse Triage Match

assignments.name: Assign_Appointment_Data_Pre_Surgery_And_Nurse
assignments.label: Assign Appointment Data- Pre Surgery And Nurse

assignments.name: Assign_Appointment_Data_Pre_Surgery_Is_Needed
assignments.label: Assign Appointment Data- Pre Surgery Is Needed

assignments.name: Assign_Appointment_Data_Pre_Surgery_Not_Required
assignments.label: Assign Appointment Data- Pre Surgery Not Required

assignments.name: Assign_Appointment_Data_Pre_Surgery_Only
assignments.label: Assign Appointment Data- Pre Surgery Only

assignments.description: This assignment collect (from the loop) questions name that belong to PreSurgery Assessment, Results are added to a Var. we are using this Var to update "SurveyDescription" field
assignments.name: Assign_PreSurgery_QnAs_2_VAR
assignments.label: Assign PreSurgery QnAs 2 VAR

assignments.description: this assignment construct an array of "QnA_Formula" (this formula is used for the construction of each string) in each loop cycle construct a string with a question and answers (each question can have up to 3 answers in the survey)
assignments.name: Construct_QnA_Array_Nurse
assignments.label: Construct QnA Array Nurse

assignments.description: this assignment construct an array of "QnA_Formula" (this formula is used for the construction of each string) in each loop cycle construct a string with a question and answers (each question can have up to 3 answers in the survey)
assignments.name: Construct_QnA_Array_PreSurg
assignments.label: Construct QnA Array_PreSurg

decisions.description: באובייקט פעולה רפואית יש שדה שליטה בשם האם נדרש טרום ניתוח קבלת ערך טרו בוליאני בשדה זה תדרוס את תוצאות השאלון כך שהתוצאות הן נדרש טרום ניתוח (Is_there_a_need_for_pre_surgery)
decisions.name: Doctors_Decision_Pre_Surgery_Is_Needed
decisions.label: Doctors Decision- Pre Surgery Is Needed?

rightValue.stringValue: לבדיקת אחות טרום ניתוח – החלטה והמלצות

decisions.description: Checks if PreSurgery Nurse is required according to received answers
decisions.name: Pre_Surgery_Nurse_Is_Required
decisions.label: Pre Surgery Nurse Is Required?

decisions.description: Checks if a survey's response correlate with PreSurgery Nurse check
decisions.name: PreSurgery_Nurse_required
decisions.label: PreSurgery Nurse required?

Flow.description:
US - 16707 Optimized BMI formulas (IsBMIforNursPreSurgery and IsBMItoPreSurgery) added function for SITE=69 (Ashdod)
AM: 20042025- 1897012323- REFACTOR (PARTIAL)

formulas.description: this formula checks if calculate_smoke>10 if true ->Nurse PreSurgery if false-> PreSurgery in not required
formulas.name: CalculateSmokeForNursePreSurgery

formulas.description: Checks if BMI is between 35 and 40 for all centers excluding Ashdod Samson (goes for Pre-Surgery at BMI 35)
formulas.name: IsBMIforNursePreSurgery

formulas.description: this formula has two parts: 1) checks if BMI>40 2) checks if BMI > 35 and site code is 33 (Ashdod Samson)
formulas.name: IsBMItoPreSurgery
formulas.expression: OR( IF(AND( VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})>40, AND( VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})<60), NOT({!$Record.Site__r.Site_Code__c}='69')), TRUE, FALSE), IF(AND( VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})>=35, AND( VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})<60), {!$Record.Site__r.Site_Code__c}='69'), TRUE, FALSE)) /* IF( (VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})>=40 && VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})<=60 && NOT{!$Record.Site__r.Site_Code__c}='69') || (VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})>=35 && VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})<=60 && {!$Record.Site__r.Site_Code__c}='69'), TRUE, FALSE) */ /* OR( IF(AND(VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})>40, VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})<60), TRUE, FALSE), IF(AND(VALUE({!Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses.Response__c})>=35, {!$Record.Site__r.Site_Code__c}='69'),TRUE, FALSE)) */

formulas.description: With each cycle of the loop, this formula takes a question name from the loop and adds relevant answer
formulas.name: QnA_Formula_PreSurg

formulas.description: With each cycle of the loop, this formula takes a question name from the loop and adds relevant answers
formulas.name: QnA_Furmula_Nurse

Flow.label: Check If Pre-Surgery Required - RT

loops.description: This loop checks if there are answers related to Pre-Surgery
loops.name: Check_for_PreSurgery_Responses
loops.label: Check for PreSurgery Responses

recordLookups.name: Get_Questions_Response
recordLookups.label: Get Questions Response
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10 OR 11 OR 12 OR 13 OR 14 OR 15 OR 16 OR 17 OR 18 OR 19 OR 20 OR 21 OR 22 OR 23 OR 24 OR 25 OR 26 OR 27 OR 28 OR 29 OR 30 OR 31 OR 32 OR 33 OR 34 OR 35 OR 36 OR 37 OR 38)

variables.description: holds the questions name related to the Pre surgery Nurse Assessment
variables.name: NurseQuestionsVar
